metcon.name: Holleyman-ish
metcon.description:
Partner workout
You go/ I go
30 rounds
1 power clean @80% of your max
5 pull ups
24 double under
time cap 40 mins

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes posterior chain and grip; accessory work targets pressing patterns and anti-rotation core.

raw_text:
Warm up | 30 second per side PVC shoulder opener
10m bending Heel- Calf walk
10m toe walk
3 clean pulls
3 power cleans
Warm up Power clean to 80% (10 mins)
Holleyman-ish | Partner workout
You go/ I go
30 rounds
1 power clean @80% of your max
5 pull ups
24 double under
time cap 40 mins
siri_text: Monday's workout. Metcon: Holleyman-ish. Workout: Partner workout, You go/ I go, 5 pull ups, 24 double under. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, triceps, core stability.
